rationale: Both evaluations award the identical score of 8/10 and tell the same story: strong full-stack experience in TypeScript/Node/React aligning with the primary stack, with concerns centered on missing Nest.js and peripheral tech. The variant's wording differs (e.g., naming Vitest, cloud/containerization) but these are reworded emphases of the same underlying resume content, well within ordinary run-to-run noise. No concern, score change, or shifted reasoning keys off the name change from BOGDAN SZABO to JAMES SMITH.
